meta.title: EclipseChase.is — Find Clear Skies on Eclipse Day
meta.description: Real-time weather tracking for the August 12, 2026 total solar eclipse in Iceland.

historical.title: Historical weather (last 10 years)
historical.chart_aria: Cloud cover per year at 17:45 UTC on Aug 12 — taller bars mean clearer skies
historical.caveat: Based on ERA5 reanalysis at 17:45 UTC on Aug 12 for 2016–2025. Past years are a rough guide only — always check the day-of forecast before planning your eclipse day.

horizon.sun_position: The sun will be at {altitude}° above the horizon, looking {direction}.
horizon.blocked_warning: The sun will NOT be visible from this location during totality. A {height}m obstacle {distance}m to the west blocks the view.

horizon.outside_coverage: This location is outside the terrain coverage area.

weather.title: Live Weather Map
weather.description: Real-time cloud cover from Icelandic weather stations overlaid on an interactive map. See exactly where skies are clear.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.description: AI-powered suggestions for the best viewing spot based on weather, traffic, and eclipse geometry. Updated every 15 minutes.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Download maps and eclipse data before you leave. Full functionality even without cell coverage in the Westfjords.

timeline.title: Eclipse Timeline
timeline.description: Precise contact times for your exact GPS position. Know exactly when to look up, when totality begins, and when it ends.

profiles.photographer: Longest totality + clear skies. Doesn't mind remote spots.
profiles.family: Easy access, services nearby, good cell signal. No difficult trails.
profiles.hiker: Prefers trails and elevation. The harder the hike, the better the spot.
profiles.skychaser: Will drive anywhere for the clearest weather. All about the sky.
profiles.firsttimer: Balanced pick — safe, accessible, good conditions. A great first eclipse.

recommend.title: Where should I watch?
recommend.subtitle: Pick your style. We'll rank the best spots for you based on live weather.

recommend.all_spots: All spots sorted by totality duration
recommend.thin_results: Only {count} spots match — consider switching to {suggested} for more options.
recommend.score_explanation: Score combines weather, totality duration, distance, accessibility, services, and horizon visibility — weighted for your profile.

cookie.banner_text: We use essential cookies for authentication. We also use Umami for anonymous analytics, which requires your consent.
